descriptionShort: Bill Hardy, ex-Clipper now with Richmond Sockeyes, previewed ahead of game three of BCJHL playoff series against Nanaimo.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes hold a 2-0 lead over Nanaimo Clippers heading into game three of the B.C. Junior Hockey League Coastal Division semi-final series at Civic Arena. The article focuses on Bill Hardy, a former Nanaimo player now with Richmond, who joined the Sockeyes in hopes of winning and securing a college scholarship. Hardy discusses his adjusted role with the team and coach Orland Kurtenbach's assessment of his performance.

attribution.headline: Ex-Clipper Hardy Ready for Game Three
